mapper.update: UPDATE pm_cl_callback SET instId = #{instId}, applyState = #{applyState}, updateTime = #{updateTime} ,updateBy = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{callBackId}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id , t1.projectId,t1.instId ,t1.remark,t1.applyState , MAX(t2.id) AS quesnaireId ,t1.applyBy ,t1.applyTime, MAX( CONVERT(t2.taskId , SIGNED)) AS taskId FROM pm_cl_callback t1 LEFT JOIN pm_cl_callback_quesnaire t2 ON t1.`id` = t2.`callBackId` WHERE t1.id = #{callBackId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pm_cl_callback_quesnaire(callBackId , taskId ,quesnaireId , quesnaireVersion ,quesnaireState ,createBy ,createTime ,effectiveFrom ) values( #{callBackId} , #{taskId} , #{quesnaireId}, #{quesnaireVersion} , #{quesnaireState} , #{createBy} , #{createTime} ,#{effectiveFrom})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_cl_callback_quesnaire WHERE callBackId = #{callBackId}
SELECT id FROM pm_cl_callback_quesnaire WHERE callBackId = #{callBackId} AND taskId = #{taskId}
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_cl_callback_quesnaire SET quesnaireId = #{quesnaireId}, quesnaireState = #{quesnaireState} WHERE id = #{id}
update pm_cl_callback set applyState = #{applyState},updateTime = #{updateTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.* ,t2.`basicDataName` AS resultName , CONCAT(t3.`username`,'-' , t3.`realName`) AS assigneeName ,t4.`quesnaireId` FROM fnd_act_hi_comment t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON t1.`result` = t2.`basicDataId` AND t2.`dataTypeCode` = 26 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t3 ON t1.`assignee` = t3.`username` LEFT JOIN pm_cl_callback_quesnaire t4 ON t1.`taskId` = t4.`taskId` WHERE t1.`objId` = #{callBackId} and t1.procdefKey = 'CallBack'
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_cl_callback SET remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{callBackId}
mapper.select: SELECT t2.* FROM pm_cl_callback t1 LEFT JOIN pm_cl_callback_quesnaire t2 ON t1.`id` = t2.`callBackId` AND t2.`quesnaireState` = 1 WHERE t1.projectId = #{projectId} AND t1.applyState = 2 ORDER BY t1.applyTime DESC ,t2.`quesnaireVersion` DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_cl_quesnaire_result_header SET evaluationHeaderId = #{headerId} WHERE id = #{quesnaireId}

UPDATE pm_cl_evaluation_header SET nextAcceptPerson = #{nextAcceptPerson}, nextAcceptPersonName = #{nextAcceptPersonName} WHERE id IN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT MAX(id) id FROM `pm_cl_evaluation_header` t WHERE FIND_IN_SET(t.projectId, #{projectIds}) AND t.nextAcceptPerson = #{oldNextAcceptPerson} GROUP BY t.projectId) tt)
